description_long: This counter features a modern, angular design with a predominantly dark exterior and a recessed workspace. The front section includes a built-in console with a raised screen and a keyboard area, flanked by two translucent green panels that may serve as touchpads or control surfaces. The main body of the counter is constructed from a dark, likely composite or metal material, with a contrasting metallic or brushed aluminum trim along the upper edge. The workspace surface appears to be made of a wood-like material, adding warmth to the otherwise industrial look. The back and sides are solid and unadorned, providing privacy and separation for the user. The overall structure is robust and functional, suitable for use as a reception desk, information kiosk, or control station in an urban environment.
description: A modern, angular counter with a built-in console, dark exterior, metallic trim, and wood-accented workspace. Features a raised screen, keyboard, and translucent green control panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the console with screen, keyboard, and green control panels, framed by the dark counter body and metallic trim.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the counter, the recessed workspace, and the profile of the raised screen.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, unadorned back of the counter, emphasizing its privacy and enclosure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the workspace depth and the side profile of the console.
